messages.message: Things just got serious.
YOu know what else serious? Your mom
This is millitary and we tell you to stop!
Fnally, A WORTHY OPPONENT!
THIS BATTLE WOULD BE LEGENDARY!
Yo seem not understands, this city isnt your to conquer
bro thinks hes top gun
this is the matchup of the century
those blades are NOT gonna cut him lol
the sky has eyes today
i washed out of flight school for this exact scenario
MISSILES INCOMING DODGE DODGE
stay calm sniki you got this
WHY IS THERE A HELICOPTER
my taxes paying for THIS chopper smh
ground control to major tom, snek is too big
20 years flying and ive never seen this
radar just gave up and quit
thats the biggest target ive ever seen
that thing cant even out turn him
BRRRRRRT incoming
release the flares!!
leave my boy alone you metal bird
this is what 500 billion dollars buys you
watching from the ground is terrifying
MORE EXPLOSIONS PLEASE
the wind from those blades alone could kill me
RUN ITS SHOOTING AT US TOO
i feel the need... the need for speed
scales better hold up against those bullets
this just in: snake vs military chopper, live
he needs to flank from below
best dogfight ive seen and one of them isnt even a plane
sir the target is too large to engage normally
comms are jammed, repeat, comms jammed
the sky is basically confetti rn but deadly
SNIKI DODGE LEFT DODGE LEFT

feels like a warzone, love that for us
refuel the chopper its not enough

they calling for backup, more choppers incoming

filming this for the insurance claim

ROOOOOAAAARRRR

this is not in the flight manual

reporting live from absolute chaos
thats his last missile, make it count
SNIKI SNIKI SNIKI SNIKI
command, requesting immediate withdrawal

thats a tactical retreat if ive ever seen one

thats gonna leave a crater

be the hero, pilot, be the hero

chasing every explosion with my eyes

HE COUNTERED THAT WAS SICK

absolute dominance, no contest
